data.title: Galaxy Digital executes one of the largest bitcoin transactions in crypto history, setting a notable record.
data.description: On July 25, 2025 in New York, Galaxy Digital Inc. reported that it facilitated one of the biggest notional bitcoin transactions in crypto history. The transaction was conducted on behalf of a client and highlights Galaxy Digital's position as a key player in digital assets and data center infrastructure. Galaxy Digital, listed on NASDAQ as GLXY and TSX as GLXY, showcased its expertise in handling significant transactions within the crypto space.

data.title: Aureus Greenway Holdings closed $26M private placement for offering units, consisting of common stock and warrants at $0.87 per unit.
data.description: Today, Aureus Greenway Holdings Inc. (Nasdaq: AGH), an owner of daily fee golf country clubs in Florida, completed a private placement offering. The offering involved accredited and institutional investors purchasing units of common stock or pre-funded warrants at $0.87 per unit. Each unit also included common A warrants and common B warrants to purchase the same number of shares. This offering resulted in total gross proceeds of around $26 million before fees and expenses were deducted.

data.title: Altamont-backed Accelerant Holdings IPO completed on July 25, 2025. Altamont is a private equity firm specializing in financial services.
data.description: A company called Accelerant Holdings, which is supported by Altamont Capital Partners, completed its initial public offering on July 25, 2025. Altamont is a private equity firm known for building businesses and specializing in financial services. This successful IPO marks a significant milestone for Accelerant, demonstrating the confidence of investors in the company's growth potential. The exact numbers and details of the IPO were not disclosed.

data.title: WhiteHorse Finance, Inc. (Nasdaq: WHF) will report Q2 2025 financial results on August 7, 2025.
data.description: WhiteHorse Finance, Inc. disclosed today that it is set to disclose its financial results for the second quarter of 2025, covering the period until June 30. The announcement is scheduled for Thursday, August 7, 2025. WhiteHorse Finance, trading under the symbol WHF on Nasdaq, will conduct a discussion regarding these results on that day.

data.title: Century Aluminum (NASDAQ: CENX) to announce Q2 2025 earnings on Aug 7, 2025, post market close via GlobeNewswire.
data.description: On July 25, 2025, Century Aluminum Company (NASDAQ: CENX) announced that they are set to disclose their earnings for the second quarter of 2025 on Thursday, August 7, 2025, following the close of the market. The details will be made available via GlobeNewswire.
AMG set to disclose Q2 results on July 31, 2025.

data.title: Gray Media, Inc. closed offering of $775M 7.250% senior secured first lien notes due 2033.
data.description: On July 25, 2025, Gray Media, Inc. revealed the successful completion of their latest financial move. Gray, traded on the NYSE under the symbol GTN, closed the offering of $775 million in total principal amount. These funds were raised through 7.250% senior secured first lien notes set to mature in 2033, known as the "Notes," which were sold at face value during this transaction.

data.title: ThreeD Capital Inc. plans private placement financing, focusing on junior resources and disruptive technologies sectors.
data.description: On July 25, 2025, ThreeD Capital Inc. (CSE: IDK / OTCQX: IDKFF), a venture capital firm from Canada specializing in investments in junior resources and disruptive technologies, revealed details about an upcoming Private Placement. The placement aims to secure financing for the company's ventures.

data.title: Meme coin Shiba Inu enters physical retail with Welly's fast-food franchise, inspires fashion avenue. Community and storytelling matter more than financial value for long-term success.
data.description: As meme coins continue to gain prominence in mainstream culture, industry experts are highlighting the importance of distinguishing between short-lived hype and long-term sustainability. Nelson Wang, a key figure at Cat in a Dogs World (CRYPTO: MEW), suggests that the recent move by Shiba Inu (CRYPTO: SHIB) to venture into the physical retail space through Welly's fast-food franchise could signal a shift towards a more expansive and enduring market segment - fashion. Wang emphasizes the potential for meme coins to establish a positive cycle by involving communities in real-world interactions through branded clothing. Drawing parallels to the success of Labubu dolls in the merchandise realm, Wang asserts that creating engaging narratives alongside consumer products can drive ongoing cultural relevance. While acknowledging the significance of financial value, Wang argues that the longevity of these lifestyle offshoots hinges more on the power of storytelling and fostering community ties. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Volkswagen's profits slashed by $1.5 billion due to Trump's tariffs, leading to lowered forecasts for the year.
data.description: During the first half of the year, a prominent German car manufacturer disclosed that import duties in the United States had a significant impact on its profit, resulting in a reduction of approximately $1.5 billion. Consequently, the company has revised its forecasts for the entire year in response to these financial implications.

data.title: AI rally shifts in 2025 as Nvidia lags behind, up 13.6% but Micron up 44.5%, KLAC up 40.4%, LRCX up 32.9%. Is Nvidia's dominance fading?
data.description: In 2025, Nvidia Corp (NASDAQ: NVDA) is experiencing a shift in semiconductor leadership, with rivals surpassing its performance in the artificial intelligence sector. While Nvidia's stock rose 14% by the end of June, it now lags behind other chipmakers who have seen stronger gains. Micron Technology Inc (NASDAQ: MU) leads with a 44.5% increase, followed by KLA Corp (NASDAQ: KLAC) with 40.4%, and Lam Research Corp (NASDAQ: LRCX) with 32.9% growth. This marks a change from Nvidia's dominance in AI markets in 2023 and 2024. The article discusses whether this signals a temporary setback for Nvidia or a more permanent shift in the AI hardware race.

data.title: Global acrylic coatings market to reach $87.8 billion by 2029, growing from $68.6 billion in 2024 at 5.1% CAGR. Major drivers include demand from construction, automotive, and furniture industries, with growth fueled by innovations, regulations, and applications in aerospace and defense.
data.description: The global acrylic coatings market is projected to grow from $68.6 billion in 2024 to $87.8 billion by 2029, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 5.1%. The report by BCC Research covers key segments like types, substrates, and technologies in the acrylic coatings market. Major end-use industries include construction, automotive, and furniture. Increasing innovation in low-VOC coatings and government efforts to reduce carbon emissions are driving market growth. Countries like Canada are enforcing strict regulations to achieve net-zero emissions by 2050, boosting demand for sustainable coatings. Major factors driving market growth are the rising demand for architectural coatings, increased consumption from the automotive sector, geographic expansions through acquisitions by major players, and growth opportunities in the aerospace and defense industries. The report provides insights into trends, applications, and future opportunities in the acrylic coatings market.

data.title: ASI honors leaders in promotional products industry with $26.6 billion market, announces winners of 2025 Counselor Awards.
data.description: The winners of the 2025 Counselor Awards have been revealed by the Advertising Specialty Institute® (ASI) in Chicago on July 25, 2025. ASI, a top authority in the $26.6 billion promotional products sector, honored outstanding leaders and entrepreneurs in the industry for their innovation and influence.

data.title: ProFrac Holding Corp. (NASDAQ: ACDC) to report Q2 2025 earnings on Aug 7, 2025, with conference call at 11:00am Eastern.
data.description: Willow Park, Texas-based ProFrac Holding Corp. (NASDAQ: ACDC) disclosed plans to release its Q2 2025 financial results before its upcoming conference call. The webcast is scheduled for Thursday, August 7, 2025, at 11:00 a.m. Eastern / 10:00 a.m. Central time. Interested parties can sign up for and join the event by clicking a link. Following the call, a recording will be accessible on ProFrac's investor relations calendar.

data.title: AG Mortgage Investment Trust, Inc. (NYSE: MITT) to release Q2 2025 financial results on August 1, 2025, with a conference call at 8:30am Eastern Time.
data.description: New York - AG Mortgage Investment Trust, Inc. publicly disclosed that it will publish its financial performance for the second quarter of 2025 before the market opens on Friday, August 1, 2025. The Company has scheduled a conference call to analyze these results on the same day at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time. Those interested in joining the call via telephone are required to dial (800) 274-8461, at least five minutes before the session kicks off. International participants should call (203) 518-9814.

data.title: American Century Investments to close and liquidate QPFF and QCON ETFs. ETFs to cease trading on Cboe BZX.
data.description: In Kansas City, Missouri on July 25, 2025, American Century Investments® revealed their decision to shut down and liquidate the American Century Quality Preferred ETF (QPFF) and American Century Quality Convertible Securities ETF (QCON). The two ETFs, QPFF and QCON, will stop trading on the Cboe BZX platform.

data.title: AMH publishes 2024 Sustainability Report, showcasing transparency on performance and initiatives.
data.description: On July 25, 2025, in Las Vegas, AMH (NYSE: AMH), a top company in the single-family rental home sector, released its 2024 Sustainability Report. This report details the company's progress and strategies in areas such as environmental impact reduction and community engagement. By offering insight into their performance, AMH aims to uphold accountability and demonstrate their commitment to sustainability. This report highlights their efforts in maintaining transparency and emphasizes their dedication to sustainable practices.
